overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring a female character walking through a neon-lit dystopian city at night. The character moves from a covered walkway under massive concrete overpasses into narrow wet alleyways with cyan neon lighting, stops to purchase food from a street vendor, and continues past illuminated vending machines. The environment showcases futuristic cyberpunk architecture with holographic advertisements and artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway

events.description: vehicles pass by on the roadway to the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the concrete overpass, moving toward the distant holographic advertisements

notable_agents.action: worker in reflective vest standing near the concrete pillar

entered.detail: massive cylindrical concrete support pillars for the elevated highway above
large floating holographic billboard visible in the distance between buildings
multi-lane street with moving traffic visible to the right of the walkway
low concrete barrier separating the pedestrian walkway from the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide concrete pedestrian pathway beneath a massive elevated highway structure. Concrete pillars line the walkway while vehicles pass on the roadway to the right. Sparse pedestrians share the path, and a large holographic advertisement glows in the distant cityscape ahead.

agents.ego_description: continuing under the overpass, passing other pedestrians while approaching a darker alley entrance

notable_agents.action: person in orange jacket walking in the same direction ahead of the character

entered.detail: large illuminated digital screen displaying 'TRUST' text on the building facade

segments.scene_description: The character continues beneath the overpass as the street falls away behind. A prominent digital billboard displaying 'TRUST' becomes visible on the building ahead. The walkway narrows slightly as the character approaches a darker alley entrance, passing pedestrians moving in both directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow wet alley with cyan neon lighting

events.description: enters darker alleyway illuminated by prominent cyan neon lights
pavement becomes visibly wet and reflective under the neon lighting

agents.ego_description: walking into the narrow alleyway, approaching a street vendor cart in the distance

entered.detail: tall building walls creating a narrow urban canyon with limited sky visibility
bright cyan neon light fixtures casting reflections on the wet ground
reflective wet concrete surface showing puddles and light reflections
street food cart with blue neon lighting visible at the end of the alley
piles of garbage bags stacked against the alley wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow enclosed alleyway where the lighting shifts dramatically to cyan neon. The wet pavement reflects the artificial lights, creating a moody atmosphere. The character walks toward a distant food vendor cart while passing trash bags piled against the walls.

events.description: character stops walking and approaches the food vendor cart
character interacts with vendor and appears to purchase and consume food

agents.ego_description: stopping at the food cart to interact with the vendor, then eating the purchased item

notable_agents.action: food vendor standing behind the cart serving the character

entered.detail: stacked cardboard boxes with red text labels next to the vendor cart

segments.scene_description: The character stops at the food vendor cart, which is now close and detailed with blue neon lighting and cooking equipment. The vendor stands behind the cart as the character interacts and eats. Cardboard boxes are stacked nearby, and the surrounding alley walls are no longer visible in the close-up view.

events.description: character resumes walking away from the vendor

agents.ego_description: walking away from the vendor through the alley, passing illuminated vending machines on the right

entered.detail: row of yellow and green automated vending machines with 'BURRITO XXL' signage

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the vendor and walks through the remainder of the alley. Brightly colored 'BURRITO XXL' vending machines line the right side of the path. The character continues under the overpass structure, moving toward distant neon signs visible in the city ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, industrial pedestrian thoroughfare into a claustrophobic, neon-drenched alleyway. It begins beneath a massive elevated highway where the character walks past concrete pillars and holographic advertisements under the hum of passing traffic. As the path narrows, the scene shifts from the open cityscape toward a darker alley entrance, passing a prominent digital billboard displaying the word TRUST. The camera then follows the character into a narrow enclosed space where the lighting transforms into a moody cyan glow reflecting off wet pavement and piles of trash. After a brief stop at a detailed blue-lit food vendor cart, the character continues forward past brightly colored BURRITO XXL vending machines before moving back toward the distant neon signs of the city.
